items.caption: A collage of three photos, each with a focus on luxury watches. the top photo shows a person wearing a rolex watch, with a caption suggesting that the watch is stolen from ben baller, a miami jeweler. the middle photo displays a rolex watch with a close-up of the face, emphasizing the brand name and the word "fake" superimposed over it. the bottom photo shows a rolex watch with a close-up of the face, and there is a text overlay that reads, "shutting down one shady jeweler a day emojijeweler is pushing fake watches by the boat load and even stole that picture of the cuban links from the legit jeweler legend @benballer. everything is bad with the ap, the subdial spacing and date window is just horrendous. the rolex ytm2 have a date wheel instead of seconds, garbage. if that previous watch would give you allergies this is some straight up gangrene." the overall theme of the image seems to be a commentary on counterfeit luxury watches, with a focus on rolex watches, and the text suggests a negative opinion about the quality of the watches and the jeweler in question.
